The '''Bothan discord gun''' was a last resort weapon that was used by [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] dignitaries when off [[Planet/Legends|world]]. These weapons fired sonic blasts at their targets and were used [[4000 BBY/Legends|4,000 years before]] the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

{{Weapon-stub}}
